requirements.R1: recurring(tree,'check document upload',10368000) and activity_receives(tree,'check document upload','signedChecklist')
requirements.R2: condition_eventually_follows(tree,'resolutionProposal and cbReport and ldReport','analyze reports') and (executed_by_return(tree,'create resolution proposal') == executed_by_return(tree,'analyze reports'))
condition_eventually_follows('resolutionProposal and cbReport and ldReport', 'analyse report') and (executed_by_return('create resolution proposal') == executed_by_return('analyse report'))
